title: Read Large JSON Arrays with Go
summary: Stream a top-level JSON array in Go and decode one item at a time.
highlights: Streams one item at a time
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers ordered item reads, nested objects and lists, empty arrays, malformed arrays, non-array inputs, trailing content after one array, handler errors, nil readers, and nil handlers.
